journal_entry.description: Repurchase and cancellation of 10,000 common shares at $6.00 per share
journal_entry.rationale: Cash decreases by $60,000 (10,000 × $6.00). Common shares are reduced by par value of $50,000 (10,000 × $5.00). The excess of $10,000 paid over par value reduces Contributed Surplus (or Additional Paid-in Capital). This represents a permanent reduction in equity through share cancellation.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Share buyback and immediate cancellation: Common Shares (equity) reduced by par value ($50,000), Contributed Surplus (equity) reduced by excess over par ($10,000), and Cash (asset) reduced by total payment ($60,000). Debit tuple: 1 liability decrease + 1 equity decrease. Credit tuple: 1 asset decrease.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Share buyback and immediate cancellation: Common Shares (equity) reduced by par value ($50,000), Contributed Surplus (equity) reduced by excess over par ($10,000), and Cash (asset) reduced by total payment ($60,000). Debit tuple: 1 liability decrease + 1 equity decrease. Credit tuple: 1 asset decrease.
